name: product-factor-skills
slogan: Reusable Factor Skills for Agent-native product optimization.
zh_positioning: 把优秀工程标准，变成 Agent 可以反复调用的产品优化技能。

skills.name: 5-factor-evals
skills.summary: Audit evaluation, regression testing, benchmark, golden-case, failure taxonomy, and release gate systems for Agent-native product projects.
triggers: Use the 5-factor-evals skill to audit this Agent project for golden cases, regression tests, failure taxonomy, and release gates.
Use the 5-factor-evals skill to add a repeatable evaluation plan before we refactor this RAG pipeline.

skills.name: 6-factor-docs
skills.summary: Audit and refactor documentation systems for positioning, first-run onboarding, information architecture, examples, accuracy, maintenance, and Agent handoff readiness.
triggers: Use the 6-factor-docs skill to audit this repository documentation for positioning, onboarding, information architecture, examples, accuracy, maintenance, and Agent handoff readiness.
Use the 6-factor-docs skill to refactor this project's README, guides, examples, and release notes so a new user can complete the first useful action in under five minutes.

skills.name: 7-factor-mcp
skills.summary: Audit MCP servers and clients for tool boundaries, schema clarity, permissions, safety, observability, runtime behavior, and integration quality.
triggers: Use the 7-factor-mcp skill to review this MCP server for tool boundaries, schema clarity, permission design, safety, and integration quality.

skills.name: 8-factor-github-actions
skills.summary: Audit GitHub Actions workflows for CI/CD reliability, permissions, caching, release automation, deployment safety, secrets handling, and reusable automation design.
triggers: Use the 8-factor-github-actions skill to review this workflow for CI/CD reliability, permissions, caching, release automation, and deployment safety.

skills.name: 9-factor-rag
skills.summary: Audit RAG systems for retrieval quality, chunking, indexing, citation, context control, evaluation, freshness, and answer trustworthiness.
triggers: Use the 9-factor-rag skill to audit this RAG project for retrieval quality, chunking, indexing, citation, context control, and evaluation.

skills.name: 10-factor-html
skills.summary: Improve HTML, landing pages, docs pages, static previews, and generated web pages for semantic structure, responsiveness, accessibility, SEO, performance, visual polish, and Agent handoff quality.
triggers: Use the 10-factor-html skill to improve this HTML page for semantic structure, responsiveness, accessibility, SEO, performance, and visual polish.

skills.name: 11-factor-cli
skills.summary: Audit and refactor command-line products so they are installable, understandable, scriptable, observable, testable, and release-ready.
triggers: Use the 11-factor-cli skill to audit this CLI for installability, command UX, configuration, error handling, logging, testing, packaging, and release readiness.

skills.name: 12-factor-agents
skills.summary: Audit and refactor LLM Agent systems for reliability, context discipline, tool contracts, control flow, human-in-the-loop design, and production readiness.
triggers: Use the 12-factor-agents skill to review this agent project.
Use the 12-factor-agents skill to refactor this project into a production-ready agent architecture.

skills.name: 12-factor-app
skills.summary: Audit and refactor apps, SaaS products, APIs, services, and CLI tools for deployability, maintainability, configuration, logging, release readiness, and product polish.
triggers: Use the 12-factor-app skill to audit this app for deployability, maintainability, configuration, logging, and release readiness.

skills.name: 13-factor-product-readiness
skills.summary: Audit and refactor repositories for product positioning, onboarding, examples, validation, release readiness, GitHub polish, Agent-native usage, and launch quality.
triggers: Use the 13-factor-product-readiness skill to audit this repository for launch readiness, onboarding, product polish, release discipline, and open-source credibility.
Use the 13-factor-product-readiness skill to turn this demo repository into a publishable product-quality open-source project.

skills.name: 14-factor-security-privacy
skills.summary: Audit repositories for secrets, permissions, data handling, dependency hygiene, CI/CD safety, Agent/tool boundaries, privacy posture, and release blockers.
triggers: Use the 14-factor-security-privacy skill to audit this repository for secrets, permissions, data handling, dependency hygiene, CI/CD safety, and release blockers.
Use the 14-factor-security-privacy skill after 12-factor-agents to review tool permissions, prompt injection risk, destructive actions, secrets, and log safety.

skills.name: 15-factor-observability
skills.summary: Audit runtime visibility, structured logs, metrics, traces, validation artifacts, failure diagnostics, release evidence, privacy-safe debugging, and Agent handoff readiness.
triggers: Use the 15-factor-observability skill to audit this Agent project for logs, traces, tool-call evidence, validation artifacts, and debuggability.
Use the 15-factor-observability skill with 14-factor-security-privacy to make this app easier to debug without leaking secrets or user data.

global_protocol: Use scripts/select_factor_skill.py when the request spans multiple domains or the primary Skill is unclear.
Pair 15-factor-observability with 14-factor-security-privacy when debugging data may expose secrets or user data.
Use 15-factor-observability when failures, logs, traces, validation artifacts, or Agent handoff evidence are weak.
Use scripts/compose_factor_review.py when a project needs multiple Skills in one repeatable review plan.
Use 13-factor-product-readiness first when the project needs launch quality or open-source product polish.
Pair 14-factor-security-privacy with the domain Skill when security findings require technical refactors.
Use 14-factor-security-privacy before public release, hosted deployment, or open-source distribution when secrets, user data, workflows, tools, or integrations are involved.
Use 6-factor-docs when adoption depends on README, docs, examples, or Agent handoff prompts.
Generate an audit workspace when repeatability is required.
Read SKILL.md for workflow and scope.
Use checklist.md and scoring-rubric.md for evidence-based review.
Render a one-shot prompt with scripts/render_skill_prompt.py when handoff is needed.
Return an audit report and refactor plan.
